texto: Why couldn't Mr. Darcy, in the first half hour of the movie, simply walk up to Elizabeth and say, "Hey, I like you. Do you want to go out on a date? And, by the way, I'm filthy rich." I'll tell you why. Because that would defeat the purpose of a chick flick, which is to entertain women and torture men.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a David E. Clarke: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Why couldn't Mr. Darcy, in the first half hour of the movie, simply walk up to Elizabeth and say,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, chick-flick, marriage pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e marriage.
